name: blueagent-skill
description: BlueAgent x402 Pay-per-Use AI tools — Data, Security, Research, Earn on Base

tools.name: pnl
tools.description: Trading PnL report for any wallet — win rate, trading style, smart money score

tools.name: whale-tracker
tools.description: Track smart money and whale wallet flows in real-time on Base

address.description: Wallet or token address to monitor

tools.name: dex-flow
tools.description: DEX volume, liquidity flow, and buy/sell pressure for any token on Base

token.description: Token contract address or ticker symbol

tools.name: unlock-alert
tools.description: Token unlock schedule and vesting cliff analysis

token.description: Token name, contract address, or ticker

tools.name: riskcheck
tools.description: Pre-transaction safety check — APPROVE / WARN / BLOCK decision with risk score

action.description: Describe the onchain action to check

tools.name: quantum
tools.description: Quantum-resistant security analysis for any wallet — vulnerability score, threat timeline, migration steps

tier.description: Analysis tier: lite | standard | premium | batch | shield | timeline | contract

tools.name: honeypot-check
tools.description: Detect honeypot, rug pull, or malicious token contract before buying

tools.name: aml-screen
tools.description: AML compliance check and sanctions screening for any wallet address

tools.name: mev-shield
tools.description: MEV risk assessment before large swaps — sandwich attack probability and protection strategies

tools.name: phishing-scan
tools.description: Scan URL, contract address, or social handle for phishing and scam indicators

target.description: URL, contract address, or @handle to scan

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Deep token and project due diligence — risk score, strengths, red flags, recommendation

projectName.description: Token name, ticker ($SYMBOL), or contract address

tools.name: advisor
tools.description: Full token launch playbook — strategy, timing, community growth, go-to-market plan

description.description: Describe your project and launch goals

tools.name: grant
tools.description: Base ecosystem grant scoring — overall score, suggested grant size, strengths and concerns

tools.name: tokenomics-score
tools.description: Tokenomics deep dive — supply structure, inflation rate, unlock cliff, sustainability score

token.description: Token name, ticker, or contract address

tools.name: narrative-pulse
tools.description: Trending narratives in crypto right now — AI, RWA, DeFi, memes, Base ecosystem themes

tools.name: vc-tracker
tools.description: Track VC investments and thesis — who is backing what in crypto and Base ecosystem

query.description: VC firm name, sector, or investment theme

tools.name: whitepaper-tldr
tools.description: Summarize any whitepaper or project docs into 5 key bullets in under 30 seconds

url.description: URL to the whitepaper or project documentation

tools.name: yield-optimizer
tools.description: Find best APY opportunities on Base DeFi protocols — lending, LPing, staking

token.description: Token to optimize yield for (e.g. USDC, ETH)

tools.name: airdrop-check
tools.description: Check wallet eligibility for upcoming airdrops and estimate potential value

tools.name: lp-analyzer
tools.description: LP position health check — impermanent loss, fee income earned, rebalance recommendation

tools.name: tax-report
tools.description: Generate on-chain tax report — realized gains/losses, income events, DeFi transactions

year.description: Tax year (e.g. 2025, defaults to previous year)
